title: zlib's 3-argument CRC-32 public entry (delegates to crc32_z)
signature: pub fn crc32(crc: u32, buf: &[u8], len: usize) -> u32
notes: zlib's `crc32(crc, buf, len)` is a thin wrapper over `crc32_z(crc, buf, len)`. Both use the reflected IEEE 802.3 polynomial via CRC32_TABLE (precomputed in zlib-types). Honor min(len, buf.len()) for safe indexing.
